title: CosmeticWeapons
description: A CosmeticArmours Expansion Mod Adding New CosmeticWeapons into Your Minecraft Worlds!
body:
![CosmeticWeapons Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca19c138a80fa449f479c98dd55741f21ef8d70b.png) ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d761fb96df1caff8d160f40627f34d944f43a6.png) ![Description Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d008893347900d5888ccf92e0a989b0820c29a39.png) [![CosmeticArmours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a156237d93726c41e9faa3c64e113eb350d9438.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmeticarmours) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2473ff82e2397dd2cde6bedcc1311cc698f9223.png) ![Weapon Pics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6dae63723a59d2893a7391af41ee99ac83b0b49.png) ![Guidebook Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbbcc6ae7326e1c21e73516c56d85c5ba7b67dee.png) [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7641efc6166c70c96b85534c2817af85b935b65b.png)](https://discord.gg/EJvFkNqrBG) ![Update Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21b2b7b17ba52dabaeb975d43aa0459bb0423074.png) ![1.1.0.0 Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cba36814c04995f327a49b85c0313f0aef17ed4c.png)
~ Plain Text Description ~

CosmeticWeapons is a CosmeticArmours expansion mod focused on adding new, balanced weapons to your Minecraft worlds, all designed to fit the vanilla Minecraft style for a seamless experience!

Show your individuality and style through the weapons you use! Wield knives, battleaxes, clubs and more! Customise even further using unique Weapon Styles! Perfect for roleplay and customisation!

Need to know how to craft something? Everything added by this mod is in the guidebook!

Feel free to join our Discord to submit your ideas!
